channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Switch 2 : la batterie serait bientôt plus facile à remplacer, merci l’Europe
item.description: Nintendo préparerait une nouvelle version de la Switch 2 conçue pour en faciliter le remplacement de la batterie. Le constructeur n'aurait pas d'autre choix : il s'agit d'une obligation de la réglementation européenne.

item.title: Attention à cette faille de Proton VPN qui peut exposer vos données personnelles
item.description: Proton VPN est l'un des fournisseurs majeurs de VPN, il est pourtant beaucoup plus faillible qu'on ne le pense. La plateforme Privacy Guides a en effet mis en lumière une faille sur une fonctionnalité essentielle aux VPN : le Kill Switch.

item.title: Walmart drafts in Nvidia RTX 4000 GPU stock to cover RTX 5000 supply woes — will this become a growing trend?
item.description: Can't find (or afford) the Nvidia RTX 5000 GPU you want? Walmart is stocking more RTX 4000 models as alternatives.

item.title: WordPress.com now lets AI agents write and publish posts, and more
item.description: New AI agents on WordPress.com could lower barriers to publishing while increasing machine-generated content across the web.

item.title: Google Pixel Watch users are reporting wacky step counts, calories burned and other stats after Fitbit's March update
item.description: Google Pixel Watch users are running into frustrating issues in the Fitbit app, but either company has yet to address them.

item.title: The biggest heist of the US-China Chip War: 3 Supermicro employees charged with conspiracy to smuggle restricted Nvidia H100, H200, and B200 chips to China – dummy boxes, fake labels, and a pass-through company enabled the $2.5 billion scheme
item.description: Three men are facing charges of conspiracy to smuggle restricted GPUs to China.

item.title: Meilleurs casques Bluetooth en 2026 : quel modèle choisir ?
item.description: Vous ne savez pas quel casque Bluetooth choisir dans cet océan de références ? Nous avons réalisé une sélection des meilleurs casques audio Bluetooth parmi tous ceux que nous avons pu tester en 2025 et 2026.

item.title: Valve's Steam Machine gets its first support update ahead of launch via SteamOS preview 3.8.0 — and it includes one major fix I've been waiting for
item.description: The Steam Machine could be closer than we expected after its recent delay, as Valve released SteamOS 3.8.0 preview for initial hardware support.

item.title: Drew Goddard Says the Sony Hack Killed His ‘Sinister Six’ Movie
item.description: Although that certainly didn't stop Sony from trying to set another spin on it up... to incredibly mixed results.

item.title: “Thank you for getting us to this point” — I thought Sam Altman’s tweet about coders was nice — then I read it again
item.description: Sam Altman’s latest tweet thanks the coders who “got us to this point” — but a closer look at that phrasing raises a bigger question about what happens next.

item.title: Jeff Bezos’ Blue Origin enters the space data center game
item.description: "Project Sunrise" would include more than 50,000 satellites performing high-energy compute on orbit.

item.title: The big Secretlab sale price-cuts the most comfortable gaming and office chair we've ever reviewed for the home office
item.description: A true home office upgrade - this office chair deal is perfect for work and play, with comfort in a league of its own.

item.title: Scale AI launches Voice Showdown, the first real-world benchmark for voice AI — and the results are humbling for some top models
item.description: Voice AI is moving faster than the tools we use to measure it. Every major AI lab — OpenAI, Google DeepMind, Anthropic, xAI — is racing to ship voice models capable of natural, real-time conversation. But the benchmarks used to evaluate those models are largely still running on synthetic speech, English-only prompts, and scripted test sets that bear little resemblance to how people actually talk.Scale AI, the large data annotation startup whose founder was poached by Meta last year to lead its Superintelligence Lab, is still going strong and tackling the problem head on: today it launches Voic...

item.title: Iran War Puts Global Energy Markets on the Brink of a Worst-Case Scenario
item.description: “This will be so, so, so, so, so bad,” one analyst says.

item.title: CD Projekt Red shares 'important development update' for its unknown third franchise called 'Hadar' — 'Work on the project is progressing dynamically, and the team has established the foundations of this entirely new IP'
item.description: CD Projekt Red has provided a new update on The Witcher 4's development as well as progress on its mystery third franchise, codenamed Hadar.

item.title: U.S. accuses Iran’s government of operating hacktivist group that hacked Stryker
item.description: The U.S. Justice Department said an Iranian security ministry operates the fake activist persona known as Handala, which claimed responsibility for the destructive hack targeting medical tech giant Stryker.

item.title: Don’t wait for memory prices to go higher — save $50 on 64GB of super-fast Crucial Pro OC DDR5-6000 RAM in this limited-time deal
item.description: Save $50 on 64GB of super-fast Crucial Pro OC DDR5-6000 RAM in this limited-time deal at Best Buy.

item.title: Trump’s AI framework targets state laws, shifts child safety burden to parents
item.description: Trump’s AI framework pushes federal preemption of state laws, emphasizes innovation, and shifts responsibility for child safety toward parents while laying out lighter-touch rules for tech companies.

item.title: Super Micro Co-Founder Charged With Smuggling $2.5 Billion of AI Tech Into China
item.description: Co-Founder and Vice President Yih-Shyan Liaw could face up to 30 years in prison.

item.title: It’s the First Day of Spring—but the US West Is Already Bracing for a Brutal Summer
item.description: The combined impact of a historic snow drought, early heat wave, and above-average Pacific Ocean temperatures could fuel a vicious drought and wildfire season.

item.title: La proposition de Mistral pour soutenir la création européenne : faire payer l’IA
item.description: L'industrie de l'IA et le secteur de la création se regardent en chiens de faïence : le premier a besoin d'entraîner ses modèles avec des contenus, le second veut mettre un terme au pillage de ses œuvres protégérs par le droit d'auteur. Mistral propose une solution pour mettre tout le monde d'accord, et remettre l'Europe au centre du jeu.

item.title: Crimson Desert ne fonctionne pas si vous avez une carte graphique Intel et vous ne pouvez rien y faire
item.description: Les développeurs de Crimson Desert ont mis à jour leur FAQ avec une nouvelle qui enrage une partie des joueurs.

item.title: Project Hail Mary ending explained: what happens to Ryland Grace and Rocky, will there be a sequel, and more on Ryan Gosling's new sci-fi movie
item.description: You've got big questions about Project Hail Mary's ending — and I'm here to answer them.

item.title: 'Is Marathon a success? Unfortunately, no, not yet' — Former Xbox exec says Bungie's new extraction shooter was built at a scale and cost that the current market 'simply isn't rewarding'
item.description: Former Microsoft Game Studios executive producer Laura Fryer believes Bungie's extraction shooter Marathon is a success among players, but the studio has a long road ahead to make the game worth its investment.

item.title: -25 % pour cette rivale de la GoPro et de la DJI Osmo Action, elle devient incontournable
item.description: Bonne nouvelle pour les baroudeurs : l’Insta360 Ace Pro 2, une caméra d’action idéale pour immortaliser vos aventures, voit son prix chuter de 449 euros à 339 euros sur Amazon.

item.title: La mise à jour arrive, les Samsung Galaxy S26 vont enfin pouvoir utiliser AirDrop
item.description: Le partage de fichiers entre l'univers Apple et les smartphones Android s'apprête à franchir un cap historique. Samsung vient de confirmer l'intégration prochaine de la compatibilité AirDrop via son outil Quick Share sur sa toute nouvelle gamme Galaxy S26.

item.title: Project Hail Mary could teach humanity a thing or two
item.description: It's hard not to find the premise of Andy Weir's Project Hail Mary instantly compelling: Something is slowly killing the sun and threatening life on Earth. That same mysterious force, dubbed the Astrophage, also destroyed every nearby star — except one. Our only hope is to visit that solar system and figure out what helped it survive. And there's just one middle school science teacher who can do it. At its core is Weir's love of technical problem solving, along with a tremendous performance by Ryan Gosling in full nerd hero mode as the aforementioned science teacher (and former molecular biolo...

item.title: États-Unis | Nouvelle tentative du gouvernement Trump pour empêcher les États de réguler l’IA
item.description: Le gouvernement Trump a appelé vendredi le Congrès à légiférer pour empêcher les États américains de voter leurs propres lois de régulation de l’intelligence artificielle (IA), une nouvelle tentative après un premier échec l’été dernier.

item.title: AI startups are eating the venture industry and the returns, so far, are good
item.description: AI startups accounted for 41% of the $128 billion in venture dollars raised by companies on Carta last year — a record-high annual share.

item.title: Amazon has slashed the Fire TV Stick 4K Select to its lowest price ever thanks to an easy-to-miss coupon
item.description: The Amazon Fire TV Stick 4K Select gets you everything you need for a dirt-cheap price.

item.title: Does Nvidia’s Slop-ified DLSS 5 Game Lighting Make Any Sense?
item.description: Nvidia finally reveals what's actually going on with its upscaler, and it's much less impressive than it first seemed.

item.title: Google’s battery-powered Nest Doorbell is $40 off right now
item.description: Buying a video doorbell is worth it for several reasons. They’re convenient if you get a lot of deliveries or visitors, as they let you glance at a phone alert to decide whether it’s necessary to drop everything and go to the door. They can provide peace of mind, too, particularly if you’re heading out […]

item.title: Des serveurs cachés dans des éoliennes en pleine mer : la parade ultime pour refroidir les data centers
item.description: L’idée de rapprocher physiquement la production d’énergie et les centres de données n’est pas nouvelle. Mais cette entreprise pousse le concept bien plus loin en intégrant directement des serveurs informatiques au cœur même d’une centrale électrique en mer.

item.title: ChatGPT might not be using the model you think — and it’s also hiding others in settings
item.description: ChatGPT’s new interface hides a more complex system where multiple models are used behind the scenes.

item.title: These are the top 6 4K Blu-rays I recommend from 2026 so far — and I've tested them all
item.description: 2026 has been a great year for 4K Blu-ray already, so I've picked the 6 best discs that I've tested as part of the Blu-ray Bounty.

item.title: 'I pretended like I wasn't afraid, but I was' — Ready or Not 2: Here I Come star breaks down that unhinged ending and one killer twist you definitely missed
item.description: Of course Ready or Not 2: Here I Come was going to have the wildest ending ever, star it left one star a lot more 'scared' than they let on.

item.title: ‘The bleeding edge of computing power for everyday creatives’ — this is why I’m upgrading to the MacBook Air M5 after years of making do with my elderly Pro
item.description: For my new MacBook, I'm not going Neo or Pro —here's why the Air M5 is the next laptop I’m going to buy.

item.title: So What’s the Deal With the ‘Steel Ball Run’ Release Schedule?
item.description: Netflix's weird silence about its release plan for the latest 'JoJo's Bizarre Adventure' saga has fans nervously bracing themselves for another 'Stone Ocean' fiasco.

item.title: Lenovo Ryzen 7 laptop with 16GB RAM and 512GB SSD is just $430 at Best Buy — but it won't be this price for long
item.description: Lenovo's 15.6-inch laptop pairs a Ryzen 7 5825U with 16GB of RAM and a 512GB SSD, delivering smooth performance for everyday creative tasks.

item.title: Vous en avez assez de la crise de la RAM ? Elle pourrait s’arrêter bien plus tard qu’annoncé
item.description: Le fabricant SK Hynix pensait que la pénurie de RAM allait durer encore 2 ans. C'était visiblement trop optimiste puisqu'il revoit son estimation à la hausse.

item.title: 'A massive leap in speed that's impossible to ignore': Our top-rated 2TB Corsair USB4 portable SSD drops to $300
item.description: Corsair’s 2TB external SSD delivers ultra-fast USB4 speeds for handling large files and demanding workflows with ease.

item.title: Un empire chinois du dark web s’effondre : 373 000 sites criminels ont été saisis
item.description: Derrière la promesse sordide de contenus pédopornographiques, un empire chinois du dark web a généré 345 000 euros de bénéfices. Le réseau vient d'être neutralisé par les forces de l'ordre.

item.title: Save £300: Lenovo's vibrant Core Ultra 5 OLED Aura Edition laptop drops to £599 at Currys
item.description: Lenovo’s 14-inch laptop has an Intel Core Ultra 5 processor, 16GB of RAM, a 512GB SSD, and a vibrant OLED display — and it's 33% off.

item.title: Sony leads the pack for the best headphones deals available ahead of Amazons Big Spring Sale
item.description: We've spotted over 20 worthwhile headphones and earbuds deals live already ahead of Amazon's Big Spring Sale.

item.title: Catch em all: PopSockets just dropped a new Pokémon collection, and it’s going to sell out fast
item.description: PopSockets just launched a new Day and Night collection featuring fan-favorite Pokémon like Mew, Gengar, Espeon, and Umbreon. Here is where to buy the new MagSafe grips, cases, and wallets.

item.title: Après le fiasco du Fire Phone, Amazon préparerait un smartphone carburant à l’IA
item.description: L'accident industriel du Fire Phone est oublié. Amazon développerait de nouveau un smartphone maison fortement infusé à l'IA… et au shopping.

item.title: It’s time cyber security understood human behavior and acted accordingly
item.description: Even with the strongest technical defenses, humans remain a critical factor in cyber security.

item.title: I tested the Ulefone RugKing Pad Pro, and considering the price, it’s surprisingly rugged and feature-packed
item.description: A genuinely capable mini-tablet with rugged certifications, decent battery life and the ability to attach a range of handy accessories.

item.title: Cyberattack on vehicle breathalyzer company leaves drivers stranded across the US
item.description: A cyberattack on a U.S. car breathalyzer company has left drivers across the United States reportedly stranded and unable to start their vehicles.

item.title: The Artist Pro 27 is XP-Pen’s latest 4K flagship display tablet
item.description: XP-Pen has launched a new 27-inch display drawing tablet that competes with the visual performance of Wacom's beloved Cintiq Pro series, but for a fraction of the cost. The Artist Pro 27 is available starting today for $1,899.99, providing a 4K resolution display with a 120Hz refresh rate and extreme color accuracy, according to XP-Pen's […]

item.title: At Palantir’s Developer Conference, AI Is Built to Win Wars
item.description: As business soars, Palantir is doubling down on a vision of AI built for battlefield advantage—and attracting customers who agree.

item.title: Ikea home office trends for 2026: breathe life into your study with calming greens and natural cork accessories
item.description: Earth-toned accessories to bring in a touch of nature.

item.title: AI workloads are increasing wasted cloud spend for the first time in 5 years – but AI governance teams might be a solution
item.description: AI and cloud spend are up, but companies might not be expanding as efficiently as they could be, leading to wasted resources.

item.title: Multiple OpenWebUI AI servers infected with cryptominers and infostealers stayed up for over a year
item.description: Almost 100 OpenWebUI instances had no authentication, leaving them open to abuse by anyone.

item.title: 7 new movies and TV shows to watch on Netflix, Prime Video, HBO Max, and more this weekend (March 20)
item.description: From the Peaky Blinders movie to Invincible season 4, you've got a lot to choose from this weekend.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Saturday, March 21 (game #748)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Saturday, March 21 (game #1014)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Saturday, March 21 (game #1517)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: It took 64 years to build Walmart. It took 3 years to turn it into a $1 trillion tech company
item.description: Walmart’s market cap reflects its transformation over the past few years. On the one hand, the fact that Walmart passed $1 trillion in market cap is notable, but not especially surprising. The company has long been the largest company in the world, measured by revenue. Almost everyone is familiar with the small five-and-dime store that started in one of the most rural towns in America and grew up to become the biggest retailer in the world....

item.title: 20 fitness tracker deals to shop ahead of the Amazon Big Spring Sale
item.description: Fitness tracker deals are already starting to roll in for the Amazon Big Spring Sale. Here's the best deals on Apple, Garmin, and more.
